name: Netlify

naming.description: Standard POSIX. Some vars are read-only (URL, DEPLOY_URL, etc.).

limits.notes: Total env var payload ≤ 24 KB. Individual values should stay reasonable. Scoped to deploy contexts (production, deploy-preview, branch-deploy).

notes: Netlify env vars are scoped by deploy context. Sensitive vars can be marked 'secret' to hide from logs. Supports netlify.toml [context.production.environment] blocks.
